title: Change Status when Group changed

posts.author: NEday (Wayne Ivory)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m an experienced developer but a Monday n00b. I asked Support whether there is an automation for:

When an item moves to Group change status to something

but they replied “no”. Can I do this using the API instead?

Thanks

Wayne

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @NEday!

Yes! While we don’t have a webhook that will let your application know when an item moves to another group, you can certainly write a cronjob that does this instead. I’d suggest making an integration that pings the API regularly to check whether any items have moved from one group to another; if they have, change their status accordingly.

How does that sound?

Cheers,
Dipro

posts.author: col-wthomas (Wade Thomas)
posts.cookedHtml: I can’t believe this automation doesn’t actually exist. Doesn’t make a lot of sense.
